scripts.link: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const h=require('os').homedir();const c=p.join(h,'.cache/opencode/package.json');const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(c,'utf-8'));pkg.dependencies['@engram/adapter-opencode']='file:'+__dirname;pkg.dependencies['@engram/core']='file:'+p.join(__dirname,'../core');fs.writeFileSync(c,JSON.stringify(pkg,null,2));"
